name: create_monitor
description: Create a new uptime monitor. Supports HTTP(s) (type 1), keyword (type 2), ping (type 3), and port (type 4) monitors. For HTTP monitors, checks that the URL returns a 200 status. For keyword monitors, checks that a specific keyword is present or absent on the page. The API key is passed in the POST body.

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.description: Your UptimeRobot API key (sent in POST body).

parameters.name: friendly_name
parameters.description: A human-readable name for the monitor.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL or IP address to monitor.

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Monitoring interval in seconds (minimum 60 for paid plans, 300 for free).

parameters.name: keyword_type
parameters.description: For keyword monitors: 1=keyword exists, 2=keyword not exists.

parameters.name: keyword_value
parameters.description: The keyword to search for on the page (required for type 2).

parameters.name: alert_contacts
parameters.description: Alert contact IDs with threshold and recurrence, format: 'id_threshold_recurrence' (e.g. '123456_0_0').
